name: clawd-line
description: clawd-line — a Claude Code statusline with an animated crab mascot

plugins.name: clawd-line
plugins.description: A Claude Code statusline with Clawd, an animated crab mascot that reacts to thinking/executing/idle states, plus gradient usage bars, git branch, and cost tracking. Bash + native PowerShell (no Node, no Git Bash needed on Windows).
